documentSreviewcommentBusinessPlan: Business plan reviewed and found to be comprehensive. Financial projections are realistic and well-supported.
documentSreviewcommentInfrastructure: Infrastructure layout plan is complete and meets all regulatory requirements.
documentSreviewcommentLicences: All required licences and supporting documents have been verified and are valid.
documentSreviewcommentResettlement: Resettlement statement reviewed. No displacement issues identified.
documentSreviewcommentLandlord: Landlord affidavit verified and properly notarized.
documentSreviewcommentApprovedPlans: Reviewed and found satisfactory. No issues identified.
documentSreviewcommentOccHealth: Occupational health and safety documentation is satisfactory and meets OSHA requirements.
documentSreviewcommentTaxCompliance: Tax compliance certificate verified with TAJ. Entity is in good standing.
documentSreviewcommentFinalMaster: Master plan reviewed and found comprehensive.
documentSreviewcommentOccupancy: Occupational health and safety documentation is satisfactory and meets OSHA requirements.
documentSreviewcommentLandDispute: Affidavit of no land dispute verified. No encumbrances found on record.
documentSreviewcommentDesignPlans: Design plans reviewed and found compliant with development order requirements.
documentSreviewcommentSafetySecurity: Safety, security and business continuity plans are comprehensive and adequate.
documentSreviewcommentOwner: Owner affidavit verified. Ownership documentation consistent with title records.
documentSreviewcommentArticles: Articles of incorporation verified with Companies Office of Jamaica.
documentSreviewcommentDisaster: Disaster mitigation plan reviewed and found adequate.
documentSreviewcommentPhasing: Phasing and expansion plan is realistic and well-structured.
documentSreviewcommentShareCapital: Share capital proof verified. Minimum capitalization requirements met.
documentSreviewcommentTransportMaps: Transportation maps and logistics plans are satisfactory.
documentSreviewcommentScheduleAreas: Schedule of areas reviewed and consistent with submitted plans.
documentSreviewcommentVendor: Vendor affidavit verified and properly executed.
documentSreviewcommentVisual: Visual impressions and renderings are of acceptable quality.
documentSreviewcommentCertIncorp: Certificate of incorporation verified with Companies Office of Jamaica.
documentSreviewcommentLease: Long-term lease agreement reviewed. Terms are acceptable.
documentSreviewcommentExciseGoods: Excise goods security plan meets JCA requirements.
documentSreviewcommentCertTitle: Certificate of title verified with National Land Agency.
documentSreviewcommentPlotLayout: Plot layout map is accurate and consistent with surveyor report.
documentSreviewcommentSurveyor: Surveyor identification report verified. Boundaries clearly demarcated.
documentSreviewcommentConceptMaster: Master plan reviewed and found comprehensive.
documentSreviewcommentLandUse: Land use plan is compatible with local development order.
documentSreviewCommentsOfTheReviewer: All documents reviewed and verified. Application package is complete.
